omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory 'Groundwater/\/\/-/\/\/Single/\/\/Source' == var:BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory 'Ground/\/\/and/\/\/Surface' == var:BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory 'Groundwater/\/\/-/\/\/Multiple/\/\/Sources' == OR OR AND | var:BLAccountWaterSourceGARPScreeningOutcome 'GARP/\/\/-/\/\/Low/\/\/Risk/\/\/of/\/\/Pathogens' == NOT true false IF
omniDataTransformItem.formulaExpression: IF(AND(OR(%BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory% == 'Groundwater - Single Source',OR(%BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory% == 'Ground and Surface',%BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory% == 'Groundwater - Multiple Sources'))),NOT(%BLAccountWaterSourceGARPScreeningOutcome% == 'GARP - Low Risk of Pathogens'),true,false)
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem

omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLAApplicant:MailingStreet "/\/\/" var:BLAApplicant:MailingCity "/\/\/" var:BLAApplicant:MailingStateCode "/\/\/" var:BLAApplicant:MailingPostalCode "/\/\/" var:BLAApplicant:MailingCountryCode CONCAT
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem

omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLAccount:FacilityHA__c | var:BLAccount:FacilityHA__c ">" STRINGINDEXOF 1 + | var:BLAccount:FacilityHA__c "" STRINGINDEXOF SUBSTRING
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem

omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory 'Surface/\/\/Water/\/\/-/\/\/Single/\/\/Source' == var:BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory 'Ground/\/\/and/\/\/Surface' == var:BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory 'Surface/\/\/Water/\/\/-/\/\/Multiple/\/\/Sources' == OR OR var:BLAccountWaterSourceIntakeCategoryL2 'Rainwater' == AND true false IF
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem

omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLOrganization:BillingStreet "/\/\/" var:BLOrganization:BillingCity "/\/\/" var:BLOrganization:BillingState "/\/\/" var:BLOrganization:BillingPostalCode "/\/\/" var:BLOrganization:BillingCountry CONCAT
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem

omniDataTransformItem.formulaExpression: IF(OR(%BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory% == 'Surface Water - Single Source',OR(%BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory% == 'Ground and Surface',%BLAccountWaterSourceWaterSourceCategory% == 'Surface Water - Multiple Sources')),true,false)
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem

omniDataTransformItem.formulaConverted: | var:BLAccount:BillingStreet "/\/\/" var:BLAccount:BillingCity "/\/\/" var:BLAccount:BillingStateCode "/\/\/" var:BLAccount:BillingPostalCode "/\/\/" var:BLAccount:BillingCountryCode CONCAT
omniDataTransformItem.name: DMConstructionPermitforWaterSupplySystem
